descriptionShort: Langley Eagles defeated Richmond Sockeyes 5-4 in BCJHL regular-season action Friday night.
descriptionLong: Neil Eisenhut scored twice as the Langley Eagles edged the Richmond Sockeyes 5-4 in B.C. Junior Hockey League play on Friday night. Tony Bobbitt scored twice for Richmond, with additional goals from Bill Hardy and Mike Clairinbull. Langley goaltender Jamie Stewart made 46 saves while Richmond's Glen Pencer stopped 27 shots in the loss.
